items.title: Here Are the 12 Best ‘Buyback Aristocrat’ Stocks
items.description: The average Dividend Aristocrat has barely managed a positive return over the past 12 months. The average Buyback Aristocrat has returned about 17%.

items.title: Can Visa's Partnership With HotelRunner Redefine Travel Payments?
items.description: V's new partnership with HotelRunner aims to transform travel finance by embedding seamless, automated global payments across the hospitality ecosystem.

items.title: Should You Buy Mastercard Despite Its Rich Valuation of 31.54X P/E?
items.description: MA trades at a premium, but strong growth, cash flow and digital expansion support its long-term leadership in the payments space.

items.title: 4 Monster Stocks to Hold for the Next 10 Years -- Including Lululemon (LULU) and The Metals Company (TMC)
items.description: One of these stocks is up 500% in a single year!

items.title: Earnings Season Is Starting. Can Strong Profits Keep the Stock Market Rally Going?
items.description: Third-quarter profit growth should be solid. Tech and AI will lead the way, but earnings momentum could broaden too.
